Pagina Test Document

This is a test document generated by Pagina, a Rust-based CSS Paged Media to PDF engine.

Features

Pagina aims to provide full CSS Paged Media support, including page sizing, margins, headers, footers, footnotes, and more.

How It Works

HTML is parsed with html5ever (from the Servo project), CSS is parsed with cssparser (also from Servo), and the output PDF is generated using printpdf.

The layout engine handles page breaks, text wrapping, and positioning within the content area defined by the page margins.
